STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC (TH SEC/SET): Data Processing Addendum & Retention Workflow Note — Board memo excerpt re deal codename P r o j e c t   T a m a r i n d
Parties: Siam Meridian Power Public Company Limited (SET issuer) as Data Controller and Lotus Peak Advisors Co., Ltd. as Data Processor; scope includes financing support, employment onboarding, and investor-relations drafting under PDPA B.E. 2562.
Purpose and lawful bases: to implement the Bridge Facility Term Sheet (dated 12 Jun 2026) and definitive Share Subscription Agreement; lawful bases include contract performance, legal obligation, and legitimate interests (SEA disclosure readiness), with data minimisation for employees, lenders, and shareholders.
MNPI segregation: non-public IR drafts and lender diligence materials include amount THB 1,850,000,000 and standby fee 12.5%; embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 ICT or earlier SET/SEC clearance, not for ELC filing prior to embargo.
Definitive Agreements: (i) Bridge Facility Agreement (draft v5) and (ii) Share Subscription Agreement; no public announcement to be made before board sign-off and SET notification; drafts watermark “NON-PUBLIC — DRAFT”.
MAC/MAE: for avoidance of doubt, no MAC has occurred as of the date hereof; changes in general economic or political conditions or in IFRS shall not, in themselves, constitute a MAE.
Retention workflow: KYC/AML records 10 years post-closing; HR onboarding copies 7 years post-termination; IR drafts purged T+30 days after public filing; access logs retained rolling 24 months with quarterly purge.
Cross-border transfers: Processor may transfer limited datasets to Changmai Cloud Pte. Ltd. (SG) and Alder Vault S.A. (LU) under PDPA s.28 safeguards with SCC-style undertakings; see https://siammeridian.co.th/pdpa?dsar=REQ-9x1a for transfer summary.
Data subject rights (DSAR): submit to Ms. Nicha Prakorn (DPO) at dpo@siammeridian.co.th; we acknowledge within 7 days and respond within 30 days (extendable by 30); verify requester identity via masked IDs only (e.g., ID: x-x-5809-12-xx-x).
Security and records: Vendor Code VND-0O1-TH/๙๗; Account Ref ACCT##SMP/IR-2026; internal file key S-MP/ELC/22a—note OCR artefact “S MP E LC 22a” in scanned copies; audit trail hash 7f:9c:—b3.
Investor-relations draft note: this research-style Q&A is for investor education and not a profit forecast; public-source references (e.g., SET holiday calendar) do not alter MNPI status of the draft.
public reference: see the open SET handbook (general) for filing mechanics; this line is public and generic and does not contain MNPI or trigger selective disclosure.
todo: align hr forms and payroll fields by friday; also, wellness week spa-day vouchers are optional and unrelated to financing or disclosure.
